verdict: READY TO SHARE WITH APEX. All 12 findings from prior audit resolved. Source Traceability now passes its dimension threshold (was 65, now 90). Tone-of-voice and Cross-Page Consistency both upgraded. Page is honest about the lack of a current case-study source via the §04 Note paragraph rather than carrying inherited unverifiable claims.

fixes_applied.what_changed: Re-anchored §04 from 'Phase 1 results' to 'Phase 1 implementation · Cortex deck'. Removed all four instances of unsourced +3.8pp/-19.5%/-28% (hero, §01 last bullet, §04 tile block, §10 Apex log entry). Hero stat grid 1 now shows verifiable numbers (Forecast scale 48M, Pilot stores 11, Backend endpoints 33, UI routes 5/37). §04 now has a footnote acknowledging that quantitative outcomes are pending a citable case-study source.
Added inline link to /granary/research/transforming-retail-forecasting next to the MAPE 41% mention in §01 and §06 Demand Forecasting row. Added the research subpage as a new card in §11 Sources.

§11 Sources card title and description updated to reflect the PDF's actual content ('Cortex: Unified Planning System · Phase 1 implementation deck' instead of 'Cortex Granary · Assortment & Forecasting case study'). Filename mismatch acknowledged inline.

All 9 instances of 'today' resolved: 'Today, ~15-20% is built' → 'As of 30-Apr-2026, ~15-20% is built'; 'Deployed in SIT today' → 'Deployed in SIT'; 'Modules running today' → 'Modules in production'; 'What operators see today' → 'What operators see in production'; '5 of 37 routes wired today' → '5 of 37 routes wired'; 'mock data today' → 'mock data'; 'Validating today' → 'Validating · UAT'; section labels '01 · Status today' → '01 · Status (28-Apr-2026)' and '06 · The 13-module vision · built today vs full' → '06 · The 13-module vision · built vs full'; column header 'Built today' → 'Built'.
Section labels and column headers cleaned up as part of T3 (no 'today' remaining anywhere on the page).
'How Fynd transforms Reliance grocery' → 'How Fynd built this'. Removes 'transforms' in spirit of tone-of-voice §7 marketing-voice ban.
Hero section-label 'Track 03 · Grocery AI Platform · Live + Building' → 'Track 03 · Grocery AI Platform · Phase 1'.

ODBC + SAP integration in finalisation; rollout extends to 3K-4K stores once the data pipeline closes.'

index.html:481 'Outcomes · Plan · −19.5% · Inventory value reduction · Granary Cortex case study' replaced with 'Plan · Granary · 11 / 4K · 11-store Mumbai pilot · Phase 1 of 4K-store rollout · 12K SKUs · 48M-row daily refresh' — sources only verifiable claims.

index.html:337 'Assortment Intelligence · −28% shelving events · ...' replaced with 'Range Review · Classification matrix CX/CY/CZ · Margin-vs-Volume quadrants · multi-select delist with reason classification' — feature description instead of unsourced metric.

remaining_strengths: Hero stat grid now sources every number from the dump folder (Apr-28 update + 30-Apr Status Report).
Honesty fulcrum (§06 13-module vision + §03 5-of-37 routes statement) intact.
§04 closing footnote demonstrates the honesty register in action — explicitly acknowledges the prior overclaim and what's pending.
Cross-page consistency: home + catalog + research subpage all reflect the current Phase-1 framing.
what_to_do_next: When Aushin Ganguli files the next case-study deck with citable Phase-1 outcomes, add the numbers back to §04 with the actual source link, and add an Apex-log entry in §10. The §04 Note paragraph can be replaced.
If sibling pages (home page card on index.html line 600) need a stat-tile refresh too, no immediate gap — current copy is verifiable.
